nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Cron every 10 min. Loads active sentinel_security_rules + recent sentinel_security_events (last 90 min — enough to cover the longest rule window of 60 min with slack), evaluates each rule by grouping events per rule.group_by and counting against threshold_count within rule.window_minutes. Raises a sentinel_alerts row via the alert-router when threshold crossed; aggregation_key dedups within the hour.

parameters.jsCode:
const summary = $('Evaluate').first().json;
return { json: { ok: true, rules_evaluated: summary.rules_evaluated, events_considered: summary.events_considered, alerts_raised: (summary.alerts || []).length } };
